skills.name: identify-fluance-fit
skills.description: Identify who Fluance can help, explain why, and suggest the most relevant Fluance format or course.

skills.name: list-fluance-classes
skills.description: List currently available Fluance in-person classes with dates, locations, prices, and remaining spots.

skills.name: book-fluance-session
skills.description: Open the Fluance booking flow for a selected class and explain the required information to complete the reservation.
